sections.paragraph: f. const. נִבְלַת ( Psa 79:2); with suff. נְבֵלָתִי Isa 26:19 elsewhere נִבְלָֽתְךָ, נִבְלָתֹו, a corpse (see the root No. 2; compare מַפֶּלֶת from the root נָפַל), of men, Deu 21:23 of animals, Levit. 5:2 7:24 figuratively of idols, Jer 16:18 compare פֶּגֶר Lev 26:30. Collect. corpses, Levit. 11:11 Isa 26:19. (Arab. نَبِيلَةُ id.)
